form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished 5th on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Raya's Romance beaten 3.5 lengths (17.07) in a Grade 6. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (16.69) at this track in a Grade 6. Has first look at box 2 this time. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth over 350m at this track, beaten 5 lengths (19.52) behind Miss Spritz in a Grade 6 on April 16. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by one length in 16.83, beating Make 'Em Rain. Last start finished 5th in a Maiden on March 30 over 300m at this track behind Mccluggage beaten 7 lengths (16.92). The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Got off the mark three back with her maiden win at Q Lakeside. Placed following that before a last start seventh at Q Lakeside. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (19.49) when fifth over 350m at this track in a Grade 6. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Has ability and should be around the money.
